content: infobox-table td Malibeyli Hamid Malıbəyli Həmid Born 1869 1869 Malibeyli , Shusha uezd , Elizavetpol Governorate , Russian Empire Died March 22, 1922 1922-03-22 aged 52 53 Aghdam , Azerbaijan SSR Genres Mugham , folk music Occupations Singer- khananda , tarzen Instrument tar Years active 1882 1922 Musical artist Hamid Imamgulu oghlu Gurbanov Azerbaijani : Həmid İmamqulu oğlu Qurbanov , 1869 March 22, 1922 was a 19th 20th century Azerbaijani singer-khananda and tarzen , representative of the Karabakh mugham school
